source_quote: Males had a significantly higher likelihood of being lost to follow-up than females (OR = 3.96, 95%CI 1.50; 10.43, z = -2.78, p = .005).

outcome: Comparison 1 All antidepressants versus placebo, Outcome 1 Rate of treatment response measured as a reduction of at least 50% on the HAM-A
source_quote: This paper is about a motivational intervention for alcohol and marijuana use in young adults, not about antidepressants or HAM-A. No matching outcome found.

outcome: Comparison 2 Each class of antidepressant versus placebo, Outcome 1 Rate of treatment response measured as a reduction of at least 50% on the HAM-A
source_quote: This paper is about a motivational intervention for alcohol and marijuana use in young adults, not about antidepressants or HAM-A. No matching outcome found.

outcome: Reception of DTP3 by 1 year of age
source_quote: DTP3: Intervention 405/418 (96.9%), Control 398/433 (91.9%), chi2=9.88, P<0.01. Children were more likely to complete the full series of vaccination in the intervention group, with an OR of 3.4 (95%CI: 2.1-4.8).
DPT3 at end-line: Intervention 90.1% (82.7-94.5%) of n=101, Control 89.4% (82.2-94.1%) of n=104. P=0.181 at intervention baseline vs endline.

outcome: Reception of all recommended vaccines by 2 years of age
source_quote: Five-vaccine full immunization at end-line: Intervention 84.2% (75.8-90.0%) of n=101, Control 81.7% (73.5-88.1%) of n=104. Difference between groups P=0.164.
BCG at end-line: Intervention 100.0% (96.3-100.0%) of n=101, Control 99.0% (94.8-99.8%) of n=104.
